title: filago montana var. minima
intro: Filago montana var. minima, also known as lesser cotton grass, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Filago montana var. minima include its ability to soothe irritated skin and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to prevent infections and promote healing. Filago montana var. minima can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
